name: Title
description: A heading component that renders h1–h6 elements with configurable order and size. Uses heading design tokens for font size, line height, and font weight.

size.description: Overrides the visual size independently of the heading order.

truncate.description: Truncates heading with ellipsis on overflow.

lineClamp.description: Number of lines after which heading text is clamped.

aria.aria-level: Automatically set by the heading element (h1=1, h2=2, etc.).
